# Transcrição: Design_the_life_you_want_to_live!

- **Fonte:** Design_the_life_you_want_to_live!
- **Duração:** 00:53

---

## [00:00 - 00:53]

Those of you who do know me here, I'm a keynote speaker. I speak at conferences. I run workshops. And in 2016, during May, that was one of the peaks of my career. I was getting married the following year, being able to buy my mom and dad, the dream home, got myself things that I wanted. And I found myself feeling pretty crap. And I couldn't understand why. I remember sitting down feeling quite depressed. And the situation that I found myself in, only I could help myself. That was me realizing that I needed to design the life I actually wanted to live. I was just living off the momentum of what was happening in my life with no real intentional control. No matter how much success I achieved, I wasn't happy. Until I really mapped out the life that I wanted to live. And that's how this has come about. Recalibrate and design the life you want to live. Don't leave this to chance.
